oliver_chung.name: Oliver Chung
oliver_chung.summary:
Out of Illinois, Oliver Chung is a tenacious competitor with 3 quarterfinal-or-better finishes, currently competing at the U19 level, building a strong foundation across 11 tournaments. Deeper runs are on the horizon.

Notably, Oliver has entered higher age groups at 1 tournament, voluntarily taking on older competition — a bold move that reveals both confidence and a hunger for growth.

Oliver is that rare three-discipline competitor — singles, doubles, and mixed. Competing across all disciplines builds a well-rounded game that pure specialists can't replicate.

With 9 different doubles partners over the years, Oliver adapts to anyone:
  • Lohith Raj Vuppala (current primary partner) — currently teaming up in BD (4 events, across 2 seasons)
  • Anjika Pattojoshi (current primary partner) — currently teaming up in XD (3 events)

Oliver has competed at both U17 and U19, showing the adaptability needed to thrive as competition grows fiercer with each age group.

With 4 seasons of competitive experience, Oliver brings tournament-tested composure that only comes from years of stepping onto the court against the best.

oliver_helix_kostro.name: Oliver Helix Kostro
oliver_helix_kostro.summary: A New York competitor, Oliver Helix Kostro is just getting started on the junior circuit with 1 tournament entry. Every champion's story has a beginning, and this is Oliver's.

oliver_hoang_long_nguyen.name: Oliver Hoang Long Nguyen
oliver_hoang_long_nguyen.summary:
Representing Illinois, Oliver Hoang Long Nguyen has shown real competitive teeth, currently competing at the U17 level, breaking into the semifinals 1 time. Across 5 entries in 2 tournaments, every deep run is a signal of growing strength.

What makes Oliver especially formidable is the versatility across all three disciplines — boasting a doubles best of #4. The ability to excel in all three formats reveals both individual brilliance and the court sense to thrive alongside a partner.

In doubles, Oliver has formed effective partnerships:
  • Angela Zhang (current partner) — currently teaming up in XD (2 events)

Oliver has competed at both U15 and U17, showing the adaptability needed to thrive as competition grows fiercer with each age group.

oliver_lien_strayer.name: Oliver Lien Strayer
oliver_lien_strayer.summary:
Hailing from Oregon, Oliver Lien Strayer has reached the podium at the ORC level (top-4), currently competing at the U19 level, competing against the best players in the region. Open Regional Championships are a significant step up from local events, and Oliver's results show the readiness for top-tier competition.

What makes Oliver especially formidable is the versatility across all three disciplines — boasting 1 singles title, a doubles best of #4. The ability to excel in all three formats reveals both individual brilliance and the court sense to thrive alongside a partner.

Career highlights: U.S. Selection Event participant (1 entry) • Junior Nationals competitor (8 entries) • ORC top-4 finisher.

With 12 different doubles partners over the years, Oliver adapts to anyone:
  • Manaskriti Sista (current partner) — currently teaming up in XD (2 events, across 2 seasons)
  • Nikhil Kandalam (current partner) — currently teaming up in BD (2 events, best: #4)

Oliver has been on this journey through U15, U17, U19 — a multi-age-group career that few can match, accumulating invaluable experience at every level. That depth of competitive history is an asset younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

Oliver has competed across 4 different regions (NE, NW, NorCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel the country and test the game against diverse competition from coast to coast.

Over 5 seasons and 1 title, Oliver has built a legacy that speaks volumes about what sustained effort and competitive fire can achieve.

olivia_liu.name: Olivia Liu
olivia_liu.summary:
Hailing from New York, Olivia Liu has stepped onto the championship stage, currently competing at the U15 level, reaching the finals 2 times. With 41 entries across 15 tournaments, Olivia is proving the ability to compete at the highest level.

A true triple-threat, Olivia competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting a doubles best of #4, a mixed doubles best of #2. The ability to excel in all three formats reveals both individual brilliance and the court sense to thrive alongside a partner.

Career highlights: Junior Nationals competitor (3 entries).

Olivia has shown remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 13 different players across the career:
  • Nila Ramesh (current primary partner) — currently teaming up in GD (4 events, best: #4, across 2 seasons)
  • Edward Chang (current partner) — currently teaming up in XD (2 events, across 2 seasons)

A veteran of the junior circuit, Olivia has competed across U11, U13 and U15, accumulating invaluable experience at every level. That depth of competitive history is an asset younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

With tournaments spanning Midwest, NE, South, Olivia isn't afraid to compete outside the home region — and that exposure to different playing styles only sharpens the game.

With 4 seasons of competitive experience, Olivia brings tournament-tested composure that only comes from years of stepping onto the court against the best.
